items.title: Private-credit managers are betting your money on a market that has never been truly stress-tested
items.description: Retail investors seeking fast cash could trigger a financial crisis.

items.title: Why strategist Tom Lee believes the AI and crypto selloffs are almost over
items.description: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee says the tech and crypto selloff has gone just about as far as it’s going to go.

items.title: If you can’t beat the market, you’d better hope it falls
items.description: Investment professionals rarely outperform in a bull market. If you want stock picking to pay off, you’re essentially rooting for a crash.

items.title: Victory Capital swoops in with counterbid for Janus Henderson

items.title: Wall Street is courting Main Street with shiny private-market products — the risks are hiding in plain sight
items.description: Private credit and other institutional investments are now within reach for individuals. But their promises don’t always align with your portfolio.
